title: Certified Polynomial-Complexity Hermite and Smith Paths in Lean 4: Explicit Inverses and a Kannan--Bachem Schedule
description: Independent lean-normal-forms research profile 0.1.0: executable nonsingular-square integer HNF and SNF paths with explicit inverse certificates, faithful Kannan--Bachem pivot stabilization, verified determinant preparation, polynomial operation and coefficient bounds, and a composed binary bit-operation theorem.
